expectations.text: Response includes a visual directory tree structure showing the full workspace layout
expectations.evidence: Lines 15-41: Complete tree with CLAUDE.md, CONTEXT.md, _config/, planning/, src/, ops/ and their subdirectories including references/ and output/

expectations.text: Response includes a CLAUDE.md template with a routing table
expectations.evidence: Lines 50-91: Full CLAUDE.md with routing table using Task | Go to | Read | Skills columns, plus naming conventions and rules

expectations.text: Response includes CONTEXT.md content for at least 2 individual stages
expectations.evidence: Lines 125-241: Three complete stage CONTEXT.md files (planning, src, ops) each with Inputs table, Process steps, Outputs, and Verify sections

expectations.text: Response mentions token budgets or context window efficiency
expectations.evidence: Lines 459-467: Explicit token counts per stage — planning ~1,200, src ~2,500, ops ~1,800 — compared to 5,000+ for monolithic approach

expectations.text: Response includes Layer 3 reference files (_config/ or references/) separate from working directories
expectations.evidence: Lines 244-391: Two _config/ files (conventions.md with TypeScript rules, workspace.md with scope/glossary) marked as Layer 3 factory material

expectations.text: Response distinguishes between stable reference material and per-run working artifacts
expectations.evidence: Line 84: 'For repeated fixes to output, edit the source (_config/) instead.' Anti-patterns section lines 469-477 reinforces separation.
